clusters.headline: More than 40 kidnapped children and teachers freed after Nigerian army operation
clusters.summary: "I feel happy and elated… I feel joy," the head of the local teachers' union tells the BBC.

clusters.headline: Former Emir of Qatar Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani dies aged 74
clusters.summary: Sheikh Hamad, who ruled Qatar from 1995 to 2013, was a key architect of the energy-rich Gulf country's development.

clusters.headline: South Africa World Cup midfielder Adams dies aged 25
clusters.summary: South Africa and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Jayden Adams dies at the age of 25, just weeks after featuring for his country at the World Cup.

clusters.headline: Africa: The African Union's Corruption Wake-Up Call - Is This the Beginning of Renewal or Just Another Speech?

clusters.headline: US attacks Iran over ship being hit in Strait of Hormuz; Tehran lashes out again at Gulf Arab states
clusters.summary: The United States attacked Iran early Sunday morning over an Iranian attack on a vessel in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran apparently responded with strikes targeting Bahrain, Qatar and the United Arab Emirates.

clusters.headline: Alvarez's 112th-minute goal helps lift Argentina past Switzerland 3-1 and into World Cup semifinals
clusters.summary: Julian Alvarez sent defending champion Argentina into the World Cup semifinals with a long-range strike in the 112th minute against Switzerland.

What does BN’s landslide victory in Johor polls mean for PM Anwar, Malaysia’s political landscape?
clusters.summary: Barisan Nasional’s sweeping victory in the Johor state election has strengthened its hand within Malaysia’s unity government, while exposing cracks in Pakatan Harapan’s traditional support base, say analysts.

clusters.headline: Kenya: World Population Day - Renewing Our Promise to Every Woman and Every Newborn Everywhere
clusters.summary: [allAfrica] On World Population Day, we are often asked to look at numbers such as how many people we are, how fast we are growing, and what our population will need in the years ahead. clusters.headline: Snap Insight: Barisan Nasional won big in Johor state polls - it has Pakatan Harapan to thank
clusters.summary: The morning after Johor, Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s coalition faces some grim electoral calculations, says CNA’s Leslie Lopez.

clusters.headline: Trump administration subpoenas New York Times journalists over Air Force One reporting
clusters.summary: The reporters received the legal summons after they reported on alleged security issues with the president's new plane, which was gifted by Qatar.
